title: Dusk's Kritical
description:
Chance Based Crits! Using The Attribute System!
with loot to find witch gives permanent attributes to players.
body:
# **Chance Based Crits**

Attacking a Target triggers a random chance(Determined by Player Attributes) to land a Crit!


This Also Disables The Jump Crit Mechanic


Both Chance And Damage Bonus Of The Crits Can Be Modified By **/Attribute** Command and Other Mods

## **Hyper Crits**

If The Crit Chance Passes 100% Then You Have a Chance Equal To (Crit Chance - 100) To Land A Hyper Crit! Which Deals Double The Normal Crit Damage.

Example : 
```
Crit Chance = 140%

Hyper Crit Chance = Crit Chance - 100%

Hyper Crit Chance = 40%

so you Have a 40% Chance to Land a Hyper Crit.
```
## **Crystals and Gems**

there are crystals and gems found in vanilla structure loot that can be consumed to increase Crit chance or damage these also can be Upgraded using smithing table.
